rationale.R1.5: The agent provides a clear and detailed reorganization plan with rationale for each section move.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty regarding the existence of datasets mentioned in the text. It also doesn't explicitly state confidence levels for its claims about the novelty of CrowdMix.
rationale.RX.3: The agent's feedback focuses on the provided text and doesn't stray into discussing unrelated topics. However, it does not fully cover all aspects of the original text.
rationale.RX.4: The agent's feedback does not introduce any new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The agent identifies areas where the text lacks traceability, particularly regarding the estimation of the LLM response distribution and the source of the 30-46% figure.
